name: asc-build
purpose: Create ONE Advantage+ Sales campaign (ASC), add 8 EXISTING ads, leave PAUSED. No live publish, no billing, no editing existing entities.
tasks: STEP 1 CREATE: Create > Objective Sales > Advantage+ Sales campaign (manual). Name 'ASC - Prospecting Test'. Conversion location Website, Pixel 1496775508183036, Event Purchase. Daily budget $30.00. Country United States only.

STEP 2 EXISTING-CUSTOMERS: Add as existing customers so it leans to NEW prospects: 'Site Visitors 0-30d excl purchasers' 120250532275930706, 'Site Visitors 31-90d excl purchasers' 120250532297520706, and any purchaser audience (e.g. Purchased>Fb&Insta>180 Days). Set existing-customer cap LOW (~10-20% or min). If no cap option, just set audiences.

STEP 3 ADD EXISTING ADS (use existing ad/post, do not create new): (1) Bianca - First Dress Promise 120248158415060706 (2) Martina Villa First Piece Promise Video 120250511847450706 (3) Coast 120250512672300706 (4) Doorway 120250512678490706 (5) Steps 120250512684080706 (6) C2 Mila White 120249807490050706 (7) Valentina Lisbon 120249796347040706 (8) Celeste Harbour 120249796362160706. Page Me + Lia, IG meandlia.us, keep each ad's existing copy/destination. If ASC forces new-ad creation, STOP and report.
STEP 4 LEAVE PAUSED: campaign toggle Off. Do not activate.
hard_constraints: Never edit/pause/duplicate/delete any existing campaign/adset/ad; reference the 8 ads only.
No budget changes to existing campaigns; do not touch Mid/Hot DPA or retargeting settings.
Decline any budget-increase / audience-expansion / apply-recommendation popup.
No payment/billing entry; if billing blocks paused save, stop and report.
If any screen mismatches (ASC won't take existing ads etc), STOP and report.

output.primary: Commit report JSON to hosting/asc-build-result.json (fetchable via raw.githubusercontent.com)
